title: Love it!
body: This app is just the thing I was looking for as I go through a breathing program.  Each exercise is customizable so if you can’t find the pattern you need, you can just tap on the buttons at the bottom of the exercise to adjust to the length of the inhale, exhale and hold.  Brilliant!  The background, music and pattern are also adjustable.  The price is unbelievably affordable. I am doing the Stasis online breathing program which is free.  This app is perfect for it.

author: chrysanthemump

title: Very helpful for me
body:
I love that it includes all breathing techniques I love the visuals of it. I decided to get a yearly subscription before it goes up because it’s very rare to find apps that solely focused on breathing. 

I will I was using calm’s breathing tools, but it glitches out a bit. I think the app just uses too much RAM or something. And I like headspace this little short ones. 

But I found this app on YouTube and I really enjoyed a little visuals and I think that’s what makes this app the best for breathing . 

I have ADHD , CPTSD, and chronic pain. I know that different breathing techniques work for different things and I get tired of kind of meditations for breathing on YouTube and the other apps I mentioned. I don’t wanna hear someone talk all the time because sometimes voices over stimulate me. Even from the people I like because there are specific people I do enjoy.

author: Rayburner

title: Simply Brilliant! A beautiful, affordable and very functional app
body:
Thank you SO much for such an elegant, wonderful user-friendly app. The simplicity and detail, the sounds and beautiful backgrounds, its so well-crafted - better than all other breathing apps I tried.

Mostly a heartfelt thankyou for making it so affordable. Really appreciate your generous and inclusive attitude to helping others thrive. 

A few requests - is it possible to preview sounds before downloading them? 

And it would be ESPECIALLY useful  to have short descriptions of what the different types of breath sequence do (specific purpose of each, as in when and why would we use certain ones, like those mysterious percentage ones)   

Also, while it seems pretty intuitive, a general overview or site-map or suchlike would be helpful, though random discovery by exploration is proving quite do-able given how beautifully everything is arranged.

This will be one of my favourite apps. Such a pleasure to use! 🙏

author: Kittykitkat7

title: Best Breath work App I’ve tried
body: I have tried probably every breath work App out there, as I can tend to be a little obsessive about such things. There was always some issue or problem that turned me off about it. One thing I hate is when an app has way too many settings or options that get confusing and fussy. It really makes me not want to use them, especially when I’m trying to relax or get my mind off worries or anxiety. When I’m anxious I DO NOT need extra things to try to figure out how I want it to be. I have used ones with seemingly endless types of breathing that just confuses me further. That’s why this App is utter perfection! You go in and easily figure out in seconds what you want and you’re ready to go. I even do this while I’m watching tv. (Not just meditating) Super easy to adjust sounds, breathing length and so on. I LOVE all the scenes! Instant relaxation as soon as I open the Ap. It’s nice on YouTube as well, but honestly I get distracted on YT if anything catches my eye or I want to look for a video. In the App I can stay focused. I recently felt I was getting addicted to a free game I was playing (I wanted to start paying to play for more time, and was getting into a territory I did not want to be.) I went cold turkey on the game. Whenever I got an urge to play the game, I clicked on the App and did my breathing instead. So relaxing and I’m sleeping better, feel I’m doing something positive for myself rather than wasting my time! Highly recommend this!

title: The best breath pacing app by far.
body: This app gives you a choice of background sounds and pattern sounds as well as separate volume controls for each, breathing pattern samples, and the ability to save your favorite sounds. Good stuff.
author: Kenchoroni

body: Just the app I was looking for!! I love the preset patterns. The vagus nerve stimulator one made me yawn within three short cycles. Perfect! And then the 1:2 ratio options are my absolute favorite. That's exactly the kind of guidance I've been wishing for! I just wish I could change the background picture to a serene landscape. I like the ball and line more than the circle and octogon, but I like that the circle and octogon has the cute landscape drawing in the background. 😊🙏

author: Sdtillt1966

body: Outstanding app! Sound effects are gentle and once you get into a rhythm you can close your eyes and keep pace with just the audio.

Edit: after using this for a couple of weeks, I changed my review from 4 to 5. It's amazing how something so simple is so helpful. It's done really well with a dark background for nite, the programmable variables and the visual graph and pleasant noises. It seems simple but clearly a lot of intelligence went into this app. No annoying ads either. Honestly, thank you for a truly helpful app done really well and made to the public for free. This is technology made in a truly humanitarian way.

title: Daily uplift!
body: I’ve been using this app the past view weeks on a daily basis and I see a real decrease in my stress level throughout the day! It’s a great way to start the day, or just when you need a moment to reset!
author: JackBBG

title: Live saver!
body: I’m obsessed with this app! It’s so easy to use and incredibly helpful in managing my anxiety and wondering mind. I’ve been using box breathing to re-center myself, relax and focus on my breathing, and lower my heart rate and it has done wonders for me. I really love that you’re able to turn on the breathing exercises and lock your phone/put it away so you’re not tempted to browse other apps and you can just focus on you’re breathing. Very happy to have this in my toolbox now!
author: Ksegrest

body: "Wonderful app. I have tried a few different breathing apps, and I have to say that this one is my favorite. It has so many options and different breathing methods in it. It is just a matter of deciding which one feels best for today. Love it, thank you Kristina"

I absolutely love this app!!I like that I can adjust the different breath sequences to my liking with sounds/music and patterns and they all do the job of calming my mind and body. I would 100% recommend this app!
It works on my s8 tablet =)

title: Best breathing app for attaining a calm state!
body: I have been following the developer’s work for years, purchased access to his previously developed site and have used many of his YouTube videos with breathing exercises, meditations and tools to getting a handle on anxiety. Everything he does is carefully designed, well thought out and highly professional. This app is proof of that. The visuals and sounds allow you to utilize powerful breathing tools to gain some control over your mental state. I would have to say, the Vagus Nerve Stimulator is new to me and an impressively powerful breathing technique…my current favorite. This is an excellent app. I highly recommend it.
author: Laurenelle5

body: I really like this app. I found it when I was looking for a breathing app which was fully customisable, in terms of the durations, breathing cues and background sounds. This is the only one that ticks all the boxes. It's easy to use and the developer is very supportive and responsive.

title: Everyone needs this!
body:
Brilliant app from the guy who first helped me to realise how important breathing is.

This is a well thought out and super-functional price of kit. If anything, perhaps there could be some info/explanations to highlight the specific benefits of each technique to the layman. Otherwise, I cannot think of anything further needed to improve the health & well-being of absolutely everyone.

Thank you Luke for sharing your knowledge and experience in such an important field.

Thanks Luke for developing this amazing breathing app. The best I've tried. Has many breathing options to choose from. I love how you can tweak each breathing session to how many minutes and seconds you want to inhale and exhale at. It's perfect!

title: Love this app

author: Gas—Man

title: Game changer for your mental health
body:
Understanding and being in tune with your breathing is, in my understanding, the most important thing you can do to improve your mental health. I’ve used the other mainstream apps for breathing exercises, and while they’re great, they can be frustrating in their rigidity and templates nature.

Breath coach is so awesome because it gives you the ability to modify the exercises to fit your needs/desires, which can be the difference between keeping up with regular breath work or burning out. Can’t recommend breath coach enough

title: Most awesome
body: Thanks
author: h9863

title: It really works!
body: This has helped with stress, anxiety and fear of flying! Thank you!
author: Jumper45

title: Changed. My. Life.
body:
I’ve been lucky enough to use Pocket Breath Coach as a tester for a few months now and I am so happy to see a full release available. 

Don’t get me wrong, even in the rough “tester” version this app completely changed my life. I’ve used several other similar apps on the market and Pocket Breath Coach is the clear winner. It is so easy to use and quickly switch up breathing patterns with seamless performance… even running in the background when I lock my phone. 

But now with the addition of premium sounds and the ability to save custom patterns, it’s even quicker and easier to jump into the perfect guided breathing session when I feel my anxiety building for different reasons.

I subscribed immediately when it became available because there were just so many of the features I had been looking for in a guided breathing app. You can really tell the developer spends time listening to his users to give the best possible experience with his app.
